name: caoxicheng-skills
description: Reusable Codex skills published by caoxicheng.

interface.longDescription: Focused Codex workflows for open-source discovery, safe Git commits, and plugin diagnostics.
defaultPrompt: Use $find-open-source-solutions to recommend an open-source solution for my goal.
Use $git-commit to analyze my changes and create a focused commit.
Use $hello-codex to verify that this plugin is installed correctly.
